top_signals.title: Nvidia details its next-generation Vera CPU for AI, setting up challenge to AMD and Intel
top_signals.summary: Nvidia released new information about its data center CPU, called Vera, that prospective customers need to fully evaluate the chip.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Who is in Andy Burnham’s new cabinet?
top_signals.summary: UK prime minister announces top team, with many experienced faces returning to government

top_signals.title: Google expands Gemini lineup with cheaper models and new Mythos rival
top_signals.summary: Google is expanding Gemini with cheaper, more efficient models and a new cybersecurity offering as it tries to close product gaps and compete on cost.

top_signals.title: Microsoft shares manual fix for WSUS sync delays and timeouts
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has shared manual mitigations to help IT administrators fix Windows Server Update Services (WSUS) servers affected by a known issue that causes Windows Update scans to fail or time out. [...]

top_signals.title: Wing Group CEO Andrew Branagh Joins U.S. Department of Commerce Trade Advisory Committee
top_signals.summary: The Wing Group announced that President and CEO Andrew Branagh has been appointed to serve on the U.S. Department of Commerce's Industry Trade Advisory Committee on Small Business (ITAC 9). His four-year term became effective on July 16, 2026.As a member of ITAC 9…
